acceptance_criteria.criterion: Project Governor current plugin version is prepared as 6.2.1 across Codex, Claude, marketplace, README, and tests.
acceptance_criteria.proof: .codex-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, examples/claude-marketplace/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json, README.md, README.zh-CN.md, tests/selftest.py, tests/test_harness_v6.py, and tests/test_claude_code_compat.py now assert or document 6.2.1.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The release documents the skill-entrypoint consolidation and does not require initialized-project migration.
acceptance_criteria.proof: releases/6.2.1.md and releases/FEATURE_MATRIX.json list skill catalog entrypoints, docs-only routing, compact default prompts, and analyzer split quality with requires_project_migration=false.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Upgrade policy was followed before changing plugin version metadata.
acceptance_criteria.proof: tasks/2026-04-29-release-6-2-1/UPGRADE_ADVISORY_INPUT.json was analyzed by upgrade-advisor and docs/upgrades/UPGRADE_REGISTER.md records the applied 6.2.0 to 6.2.1 decision.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No skills were deleted, renamed, or deprecated during release prep.
acceptance_criteria.proof: The skill catalog analyzer reports 35 skills, 35 catalog entries, zero issues, zero open consolidation candidates, and eight resolved consolidations.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Claude Code plugin metadata remains valid after the version bump.
acceptance_criteria.proof: claude plugin validate passed for both the plugin root and examples/claude-marketplace.

tests.command: python3 -m compileall tools skills tests claude
claude plugin validate . && claude plugin validate examples/claude-marketplace

docs_refresh.reason: Release prep changes public plugin metadata, install refs, release feature matrix, and upgrade register.
